doc_content.summary: Scaffold a standardized developer documentation structure into any repository with four combinable modes. Automatically provisions templates, migrates scattered markdown files, generates initial documentation from git history, and wires up static site generation.
key_features: Idempotent template scaffolding (--template) creates standard directories, mkdocs.yml, and PR templates
Intelligent backfilling (--backfill) analyzes git history, PRs, and config files to auto-generate ADRs, specs, and guides
Automated migration (--upgrade) finds scattered repository markdown, classifies it, moves it to the central docs folder, and fixes broken links
Safe cleanup (--clean) removes boilerplate skeletons without touching user-generated content

alt_text: Visualization of the stark-init-docs skill showing the four operational modes (template, backfill, upgrade, clean), their execution workflows, and generated documentation artifacts.
